fields.name: Detail Number
fields.description: Position number or detail number of the part

fields.name: Customer Part Number
fields.description: Customer-specific part number or drawing reference

fields.name: Higher index available
fields.description: Whether a higher revision index is available
fields.description_de: Ob ein höherer Revisionsindex vorhanden ist

fields.name: Design Count
fields.description: Number of pieces required per design/construction

fields.name: Spare Count
fields.description: Number of spare parts

fields.name: Description
fields.description: Name or description of the part/component

fields.name: Dimensions X/D
fields.description: Finished dimension X or diameter D in mm
fields.description_de: Fertigmaß X-Richtung oder Durchmesser in mm

fields.name: Dimensions Y/L
fields.description: Finished dimension Y or length L in mm
fields.description_de: Fertigmaß Y-Richtung oder Länge in mm

fields.name: Dimensions Z
fields.description: Finished dimension Z (height/depth) in mm

fields.name: Material
fields.description: Material or steel grade of the part

fields.name: Parts Group
fields.description: Part group classification (tooling category)

fields.name: 2D exists
fields.description: Whether a 2D drawing exists

fields.name: 3D exists
fields.description: Whether a 3D model exists

fields.name: Hardness
fields.description: Required hardness specification

fields.name: Nitriding
fields.description: Whether nitriding is required (Yes/No)

fields.name: Nitriding type
fields.description: Type of nitriding process

fields.name: Nitriding depth
fields.description: Nitriding depth specification

fields.name: Coating
fields.description: Surface coating specification

fields.name: Manufacturer
fields.description: Manufacturer or supplier of the part/material
fields.description_de: Hersteller / Lieferant des Teils oder Materials

fields.name: Manufacturer officially required
fields.description: Whether the specified manufacturer is mandatory
fields.description_de: Ob der angegebene Hersteller zwingend ist

fields.name: Manufacturer part no.
fields.description: Manufacturer-specific part or material number

fields.name: Schaufler Tooling Standard
fields.description: Whether part is according to Schaufler internal standard
fields.description_de: Ob das Teil dem Schaufler-internen Standard entspricht

fields.name: Target cost block description
fields.description: Target cost block key for cost allocation

fields.name: Special Notes
fields.description: Special notes or remarks about the part
fields.description_de: Besondere Hinweise oder Bemerkungen zum Bauteil

fields.name: Refurbishment
fields.description: Whether the part is for refurbishment/restocking
fields.description_de: Ob das Teil für Neubestückung vorgesehen ist

fields.name: Pre assembling
fields.description: Whether part requires pre-assembly

fields.name: What has been changed?
fields.description: Change description for revision tracking

fields.name: Detailed Drawing
fields.description: Whether detailed drawing exists (Ja/Nein dropdown)
fields.description_de: Ob eine detaillierte Zeichnung vorhanden ist (Ja/Nein)

fields.name: Drawings sent to STL
fields.description: Whether drawings were sent to STL (Ja/Nein dropdown)
fields.description_de: Ob Zeichnungen an STL versendet wurden (Ja/Nein)

fields.name: Drawings sent from STL
fields.description: Whether drawings were issued from STL (Ja/Nein dropdown)
fields.description_de: Ob Zeichnungen von STL ausgegeben wurden (Ja/Nein)
